title: My Work - Tasks Broken Out By Project
excerpt:
Can we please get My Work broken out by board / project? 
I want to be able to have By Project as a sort order, like Asana has. 
This would make our work at our agency infinitely easier! 
I’m sure this is a common reques…

posts.author: lukeneely (Luke Neely)
posts.cookedHtml:
Can we please get My Work broken out by board / project?

I want to be able to have By Project as a sort order, like Asana has.

This would make our work at our agency infinitely easier!

I’m sure this is a common request.
